columns.name: aar
columns.description: The year of the calculation or reference.

columns.name: anleggnr
columns.description: The number of the installation or site involved in the calculation.

columns.name: partinr
columns.description: The part number related to the item being calculated.

columns.name: leveransenr
columns.description: The supply order or delivery number associated with the calculation.

columns.name: korrnr
columns.description: The correction number for related calculations or entries.

columns.name: trekktype
columns.description: The type of charging involved in the calculation.

columns.name: dato
columns.description: The date associated with the calculation or reference.

columns.name: dager
columns.description: The number of days for which the calculation is applied.

columns.name: prosent
columns.description: The percentage rate used in the calculation.

columns.name: grunnlag
columns.description: The base amount or value on which calculations are based.

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: The user ID or identifier of the entity performing or associated with the calculation.

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was created or last modified.

columns.name: journalnr
columns.description: The journal number associated with financial or transactional entries.

columns.name: oppgjbrev_nr
columns.description: The opportunity letter number for related business documents.

columns.name: linjenr
columns.description: The line number within a document or calculation set.
